---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement for the images
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of the problem, e.g. "The micro image is missing [...]".

## Describe the solution you'd like

What you want to happen (new distro/version, new flavor, new hardening behavior, ...).

## Describe alternatives you've considered

Any workarounds or alternative approaches you've tried.

## Additional context

Anything else — links, example Dockerfiles, related issues.
